title: AnimatedCounter
description: Smooth animated number counting from startValue to endValue. Supports prefix/suffix and optional label.

startValue.description: Starting number for the count animation

endValue.description: Ending number for the count animation

duration.description: Duration of the counting animation in seconds

label.description: Optional label displayed below the number

color.description: Optional color override. Theme keys (primary, secondary, etc.) or hex/rgb.

useCase.description: Smooth number counting animation for metrics and progress
useCase.when: Use when showing a number incrementing or decrementing over time (e.g., progress, revenue, score)
useCase.notFor: Static number display — use bigNumber for dramatic static reveals

sizingBehavior.description: AnimatedCounter centers content within the slot
sizingBehavior.fontScaling: Font size scales with slot dimensions; larger on mobile
